homeFilters.locationDenied: Enable location to sort by distance.
homeFilters.locationError: Couldn't get your location. Try again.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email on your ApRez account. We'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: If an account exists, we've sent a reset link to that email. Open it on your phone to set a new password.
forgot.errorGeneric: Couldn't send the reset link. Try again.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Pick a new password for your ApRez account.
reset.success: Password updated. Returning you to the login screen…
reset.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
reset.errorMissingToken: This screen needs a token. Open the link from your reset email on this phone.
reset.errorTokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
reset.errorTokenUsed: This reset link has already been used.

deleteAccount.sectionHint: Permanently delete your ApRez account and remove your personal details.
deleteAccount.confirmBody: This permanently deletes your account. Your reservation history stays with the restaurants you booked, but your name and contact details will be removed and this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: Couldn't delete your account. Try again.

phonePrompt.headline: Add a phone number?
phonePrompt.body: The restaurant may need to reach you if anything changes with your reservation. You can add this later from your profile.
phonePrompt.errorFormat: Phone must be in the format +40 followed by 9 digits.

bookConfirm.successBodyConfirmed: You're all set. We've sent the details to your email.
bookConfirm.successBodyPending: Your reservation is pending confirmation from the restaurant. You'll hear back soon.

reservationDetail.title: Reservation details
reservationDetail.cancelConfirmBody: This can't be undone. The restaurant will be notified.
reservationDetail.pendingModNote: You have a pending change request. The restaurant will respond soon.

modify.title: Request a change
modify.subtitle: Change date, time, or party size. The restaurant will confirm or decline.
modify.pendingBody: We've sent your change request to the restaurant. You'll get a notification when they respond.

modRejected.cancelConfirmBody: This permanently cancels the original reservation. The restaurant will be notified.

errors.modificationAlreadyPending: You already have a pending change request on this reservation.
errors.noOpModification: Please change at least one field.
errors.dateNotAvailable: Date isn't available at this restaurant.
errors.timeOutsideHours: Time isn't within the restaurant's opening hours.
